nasb.text: Go on your way, inhabitant of Shaphir, in shameful nakedness. The inhabitant of Zaanan does not escape. The lamentation of Beth-ezel: “He will take from you its support.”

esv.text: Pass on your way, inhabitants of Shaphir, in nakedness and shame; the inhabitants of Zaanan do not come out; the lamentation of Beth-ezel shall take away from you its standing place.

cnv.text: 沙斐的居民哪！你們赤身羞愧走過去吧。 撒南的居民不敢出來； 伯．以薛人的哀號，要把你們立足之地奪去。

ccb.text: 沙斐的居民啊， 你们将赤身露体， 被羞辱地掳去。 撒南的居民不敢出城， 伯·以薛在痛哭， 你们已失去它的庇护。
